title: cordia troyana
intro: Cordia troyana, also known as the Panama rose or Panama berry, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. The leaves and fruits of Cordia troyana have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Cordia troyana is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal remedies to address various health concerns.
